ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id_user" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id_user")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "id_role" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id_role")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "id_audit" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "id_user" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, update) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id_audit")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "id_model" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., logistic regression, decision tree) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id_model")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "id_sample" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "id_model" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the models table */,
  "actual_outcome" TEXT /* Actual outcome of the sample (e.g., H, L) */,
  "predicted_outcome" TEXT /* Predicted outcome of the sample (e.g., H, L) */,
  "high_probability" REAL /* Probability of the high outcome */,
  "low_probability" REAL /* Probability of the low outcome */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id_sample")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "id_model" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the models table */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metrics were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metrics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id_model")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "id_source" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id_source")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_samples" (
  "id_sample" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sample */,
  "id_source" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data_sources table */,
  "data" TEXT /* Actual data sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id_sample")
)
